# The Ledger

> A searchable reference for accountants and chartered accountants covering GST, income tax, TDS, corporate law, and compliance due dates in India.

## Categories

- [GST / Indirect Tax](/learn/gst): Input tax credit, GSTR filings, GST 2.0 rate structure.
- [Income Tax](/learn/income-tax): TDS/TCS, ITR filing, the transition to the Income Tax Act, 2025.
- [Payroll & Labour Codes](/learn/payroll-labour-codes): EPF, ESI, gratuity, and the four Labour Codes.
- [Corporate Law](/learn/corporate-law): Companies Act compliance, ROC filings, grant/budget compliance.
- [Compliance Calendar](/learn/compliance-calendar): Due dates across GST, TDS, ITR, ROC, and payroll.

## Notes

Content is factual reference material aimed at practising accountants; entries cite the relevant section or rule and note the last-updated date.
